query: 帮我设计一个新功能：用户通知中心，支持站内信、邮件、push 三种渠道
我想给项目加一个主题切换功能，支持亮色/暗色/跟随系统
我们需要一个全新的 onboarding 流程，帮新用户快速上手产品
add a dashboard feature that shows real-time metrics for the data pipeline
build a new file upload system that supports chunked upload and resume
we need to add multi-tenant support to the app, how should we approach this?
想做一个 AI 辅助写作功能，用户可以选中文本让 AI 改写
let's add a commenting system to the blog posts, with threading and reactions
修复这个 typo：第 23 行把 recieve 改成 receive
查看 TODO.md 里有哪些待办项
运行测试看看有没有失败的用例
fix this null pointer exception in UserService.java line 87
删掉这个没用的 console.log 语句
update the API timeout from 3000ms to 5000ms in the config file
git status 看一下现在改了哪些文件
帮我看看这段代码为什么报 undefined is not a function
bump the lodash version to 4.17.21 in package.json
rename the variable `data` to `userData` throughout the file
